actionLibraryList.title: Mat Scapula Isolation
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Lie on your back with a neutral spine and pelvis. Place your feet hip-width apart on the mat. Extend your arms straight toward the ceiling with palms facing inward. Keep the shoulder blades neutral.
2.Inhale, protract the shoulder blades, creating a stretch between them.
3.Exhale, return the shoulder blades to neutral, extending and stretching the posterior shoulder girdle.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770688675769.jpg","context":"1.Keep the lower back stable, pressing the sacrum into the mat.\n2.Keep the lower limbs firmly planted and still."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale to return the shoulder blades to neutral.
Inhale to protract and stretch between the shoulder blades.
actionLibraryList.motionFeeling: Engage Back Muscles.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Avoid over-retracting the shoulder blades during the movement.
2.Keep the spine stable; avoid any spinal movement.

actionLibraryList.title: Mat Side-Lying Clam
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Lie on your side in a neutral spine position. Relax the chest, align the head, torso, and legs in a straight line, with heels together. Engage the core. Inhale to prepare.
2.Exhale, lift the top leg, engaging the glutes to abduct while keeping the pelvis vertical and stable.
3.Inhale, control the return as the leg lowers back to the starting position.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770689370239.jpg","context":"1.Allow the shoulders to relax and sink naturally.\n2.Keep the pelvis vertical to the floor."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale to lift and engage.
Inhale to lower and return.
actionLibraryList.motionFeeling: Engage Hips.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Keep the pelvis stable; avoid tilting or rocking forward/backward.
2.Keep the shoulders relaxed; avoid shrugging.
3.Maintain control throughout; avoid losing tension during lowering.

actionLibraryList.title: Mat Saw
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Sit upright on your sit bones with legs extended and hip-width apart, arms extended to the sides at shoulder height.
2.Inhale and rotate the torso to the left, bringing the right arm toward the left foot.
3.Exhale, engaging the abdominals, as you hinge forward at the head and torso, reaching the right arm toward the left pinky toe. Simultaneously, externally rotate the shoulders and extend the left arm backward with the palm facing the ceiling.
4.Inhale to return to the starting position, sitting balanced on the sit bones with arms extended to the sides. Rotate the torso to the right, reaching the left arm toward the right foot.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770689920014.jpg","context":"1.Keep the shoulders down.\n2.Anchor the sit bones on the mat, maintain a neutral pelvis, and avoid overarching the lower back."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Inhale to rotate and lengthen, preparing the movement.
Exhale to hinge forward and extend, engaging the muscles.
Inhale to return to center and switch sides.
actionLibraryList.motionFeeling: Engage the core and hips.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Avoid shrugging the shoulders.
2.Do not let the lower back sag.
3.Maintain control; do not swing with momentum.

actionLibraryList.title: Mat Coordination
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Start in a kneeling quadruped position with hands under shoulders and knees under hips. Keep the spine neutral, pelvis stable, and core engaged. Inhale to prepare.
2.Exhale, keeping the torso still, extend one arm forward while simultaneously extending the opposite leg backward, reaching both to form a straight line with the body.
3.Inhale, maintain the extension and stability, keeping the spine and pelvis neutral.
4.Exhale, control the return to the starting position, then repeat on the opposite side.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770688768674.jpg","context":"1.Keep the spine and pelvis stable; avoid sagging the lower back.\n2.Relax the shoulders and neck."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale to extend and return the arm and leg.
Inhale to hold and stabilize the position.
actionLibraryList.motionFeeling: Engage Shoulders, Hips, and Legs.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Avoid sagging or arching the lower back.
2.Keep the spine and pelvis stable; avoid rotation.
3.Keep the shoulders relaxed and shoulder blades stable; avoid shrugging.

actionLibraryList.title: Lying Arm Circles
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Open the arms out to the sides, lower them close to the floor, then press down. From near the hips, control the arms inward and upward, drawing circles along the sides of the body, and finish with the arms returning to a position above the chest.
3.Keep the arms below shoulder level throughout the movement.
4.Maintain a stable tabletop position with the legs, keeping the pelvis and spine steady the entire time.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770626713742.jpg","context":"1.Keep the knees stacked directly over the hips, maintaining a stable tabletop position.\n2.Gently press the lower back into the mat and keep the pelvis stable.\n3.Relax the shoulders and draw them down away from the ears."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate: Breathe steadily throughout.
actionLibraryList.motionFeeling: Engage the back, core, and arms.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Keep the ribs from flaring and avoid arching the lower back.
2.Avoid shrugging the shoulders.
3.Keep the wrists neutral—don’t flex them.
4.Don’t let the knees drift toward the chest.

actionLibraryList.title: Lying Alternate Arm
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Start with both arms straight and reaching vertically toward the ceiling. One arm opens out to the side to about 60 degrees. Exhale as both straight arms press down together to the hips.
2.Inhale and switch arms: the arm that opened first stays close to the body and returns vertically, while the opposite arm opens out to 60 degrees, then lifts and returns to the starting position.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770626733170.jpg","context":"1.Keep the knees stacked directly over the hips, maintaining a stable tabletop position.\n2.Press the lower back gently into the mat and keep the pelvis stable.\n3.Relax the shoulders and draw them down away from the ears."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale to press down with control.
Inhale to slowly return.
actionLibraryList.motionFeeling: Engage the back, core, and arms.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Keep the ribs from flaring and avoid arching the lower back.
2.Avoid shrugging the shoulders.
3.Keep the wrists neutral—don’t flex them.
4.Don’t let the knees drift toward the chest.

actionLibraryList.title: Supine Leg Scissors
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Lie on your back with your core engaged and both legs lifted about 30° off the floor. Inhale to prepare; exhale as one leg extends upward toward the ceiling while the other lowers with control toward the floor, keeping the pelvis stable.
2.Inhale as the legs switch positions in the air, maintaining length and control, continuing the scissor-like alternation.
3.Optionally, flex the toes upward or point them downward to increase activation of the posterior or anterior leg muscles.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770627136008.jpg","context":"1.Relax the shoulders and neck.\n2.Keep the pelvis stable, with the lower back pressed gently into the mat."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale, engage the core, and lower one leg with control.
Inhale, extend and switch both legs.
actionLibraryList.motionFeeling: Engage the hips and lower limbs.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Keep the pelvis stable; avoid sagging or arching the lower back.
2.Do not lower too quickly; maintain control.

actionLibraryList.title: Supine Leg Helicopter
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Inhale to prepare while lying on your back, engaging the core and lifting both legs about 30° off the floor.
2.Exhale as you perform the scissor legs: one leg rises toward vertical while the other lowers with control.
3.Inhale as the legs switch positions in the air, completing the second scissor.
4.Exhale: when the legs reach their farthest points, open them outward in a circular motion; inhale to bring them back together along the scissor path and continue the movement.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770627151926.jpg","context":"1.Relax the shoulders and neck.\n2.Keep the pelvis stable, with the lower back gently pressed into the mat."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale, engage the core, and perform the scissor legs with outward circular motion.
Inhale as the legs extend and switch positions, maintaining stability.
actionLibraryList.motionFeeling: Engage the hips and lower limbs.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Keep the pelvis stable; avoid sagging or arching the lower back.
2.Do not lower too quickly; maintain control.

actionLibraryList.title: Walking on the Ceiling
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Extend both legs outward at a 30-degree angle. Inhale as you gradually bend one leg toward 90 degrees while keeping the other leg straight, simultaneously flexing the hips to lift the straight leg so it forms a 60-degree angle with the mat.
2.Exhale as you lower both legs in a controlled manner, extending the bent leg while maintaining control, until both legs are straight and return to the starting position.
3.Inhale as you switch the legs and repeat the movement in a continuous cycle.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770627499591.jpg","context":"1.Keep the lower back pressed into the mat.\n2.Allow the shoulders to relax downward and avoid shrugging."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale to lower the legs.
Inhale to maintain position and switch legs.
actionLibraryList.motionFeeling: Engage the hips and thighs.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Keep the pelvis stable—avoid collapsing or over-arching the lower back.
2.Perform the movement with control and avoid letting the rope snap back too quickly.

actionLibraryList.title: Stag
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Extend both legs outward at a 30-degree angle. Inhale as you gradually bend one leg and open the hip into a frog-leg position, while keeping the other leg extended and abducted. Simultaneously flex the hip to lift the straight leg so it forms a 60-degree angle with the mat.
2.Exhale as you adduct both legs and lower them in a controlled manner, straightening the bent leg until both legs return to the starting position.
3.Inhale as you switch the legs and repeat the movement in a continuous cycle.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770627524139.jpg","context":"1.Keep the lower back pressed into the mat.\n2.Allow the shoulders to relax downward and avoid shrugging."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate: Exhale to lower the legs; inhale to hold and switch legs.
actionLibraryList.motionFeeling: Engage the hips and thighs.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Keep the pelvis stable—avoid collapsing or over-arching the lower back.
2.Perform the movement with control, and avoid letting the rope snap back too quickly.

actionLibraryList.title: Round-Back Row
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Sit upright and lengthen the spine. Exhale as you roll the spine back into a slight lean.
2.Inhale, turn the palms outward and open the arms to the sides, reaching to just in front of the shoulders.
3.Exhale, hinge the torso forward and lower the head as the arms pull back past the line of the back.
4.Inhale, circle the arms forward and upward, returning the hands to the front reach line.
5.Exhale, draw the abdominals back and use the back to return the body to an upright position.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770687253441.jpg","context":"1.Keep the legs together, extended forward, and locked.\n2.Relax the shoulders and neck."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Inhale to lengthen and open.
Exhale to roll, engage, and return.
actionLibraryList.motionFeeling: Engage the arms, shoulders, and core.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.No shoulder shrugging or neck compensation.
2.Feet stay grounded.

actionLibraryList.title: Coordination Hip Open
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Lie supine in tabletop position, elbows bent at 90°, fingertips pointing toward the ceiling. Inhale, lengthen the spine to prepare.
2.Exhale, straighten the arms while lowering the legs down to the "Hundred" position, lifting the torso into a curl.
3.Inhale, keep the core engaged, and control the legs as you open them outward, then bring them back together.
4.Exhale, bend the knees back to tabletop position.
5.Inhale, bend the elbows and lower the torso back to the mat, returning to the starting position.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770688239607.jpg","context":"1.Keep the shoulders down.\n2.Keep the lower back stable against the floor."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale to extend and curl up.
Inhale to stabilize and return to start.
actionLibraryList.motionFeeling: Engage the core, shoulders, back, and legs.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Avoid rib flaring or sagging lower back; keep the core engaged.
2.Keep the shoulders relaxed.
3.Avoid swinging the legs or opening them too wide, maintaining control.

actionLibraryList.title: Coordination Arm Open
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Inhale, lie supine in tabletop position with elbows bent at 90° and fingertips pointing toward the ceiling, lengthening the spine to prepare.
2.Exhale, straighten the arms while lowering the legs into the "Hundred" position, curling the torso, and keeping the core engaged.
3.Inhale at the top, and control the arms as you open them outward to the sides, not exceeding shoulder height.
4.Exhale, draw the arms back to the sides, maintaining core stability.
5.Inhale, bend the elbows and knees, roll the torso down segment by segment, returning to the starting position.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770688262172.jpg","context":"1.Keep the shoulders down.\n2.Keep the lower back stable against the floor."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale to engage, extend, and curl up.
Inhale to open, return, and reset.
actionLibraryList.motionFeeling: Engage the core, shoulders, back, and legs.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Avoid rib flaring or sagging lower back; keep the core engaged.
2.Keep the shoulders relaxed.
3.Avoid swinging the arms or opening them too wide; maintain control.

actionLibraryList.title: Coordination Starfish
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Inhale, lie supine in tabletop position with elbows bent at 90° and fingertips pointing toward the ceiling, lengthening the spine to prepare.
2.Exhale, straighten the arms while lowering the legs into the "Hundred" position, curling the torso, and keeping the core engaged.
3.Inhale at the top, simultaneously open the arms and legs outward, forming a starfish shape.
4.Exhale, draw the arms and legs back together in sync, maintaining control.
5.Inhale, bend the elbows and knees, roll the torso down segment by segment, returning to the starting position.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770688281661.jpg","context":"1.Keep the shoulders down.\n2.Keep the lower back stable against the floor."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale to tighten and engage.
Inhale to open and return to start.
actionLibraryList.motionFeeling: Engage the core, shoulders, back, and legs.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Avoid rib flaring or sagging lower back; keep the core engaged.
2.Keep the shoulders relaxed.
3.Avoid swinging the arms or legs, and do not open them too wide; maintain control.

actionLibraryList.title: Chest Expansion Opposite Arm
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Look forward. Extend the arms straight in front at shoulder height to prepare. Inhale, lean back while extending the arms backward and outward.
2.Exhale. Open the arms outward along the tension of the rope, controlling the return to the original horizontal position.
3.Inhale. Switch sides and perform the backward pull on the other side.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770631808229.jpg","context":"1.Keep the shoulders down and stable."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Inhale to pull.
Exhale to return.
actionLibraryList.motionFeeling: Engage the shoulders and back.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Maintain a neutral spine; avoid sagging the lower back.
2.Keep the elbows nearly straight and stable.
3.Keep the shoulders down; avoid shrugging.

actionLibraryList.title: Chest Expansion with Head Rotation
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Inhale. Engage the back and rear shoulder muscles to pull the arms backward slightly past the sides of the body and hold.
2.Hold your breath. Rotate the cervical spine to the right, then turn the head to the left, and return to neutral.
3.Exhale. Slowly and under control, bring the hands forward to return the handles to the starting position.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770628932212.jpg","context":"1.Keep the torso stable.\n2.Keep the shoulders relaxed and down.\n3.Keep the arms straight."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Inhale on effort.
Exhale to return.
Hold breath for cervical rotation.
actionLibraryList.motionFeeling: Engage the back and neck.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Keep the wrists neutral; avoid bending.
2.Keep the shoulders down and relaxed.
3.Maintain a stable pelvis; avoid sagging the lower back.

actionLibraryList.title: Standing Butterfly
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Lengthen the body upward.
2.Exhale, keeping the lower body stable, bend the torso to one side; sweep the upper arm in an arc while pulling the lower arm toward the floor.
3.Inhale, and slowly return to the neutral position with control.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770628864577.jpg","context":"1.Keep the torso stable.\n2.Maintain the shoulders in a relaxed, lowered position.\n3.Keep the arms fully extended."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate: Maintain steady, even breathing
actionLibraryList.motionFeeling: Engage the shoulders and core
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Keep the shoulders down—do not shrug.
2.Maintain a stable center of gravity—do not shift your weight.
3.Ensure proper control throughout the movement.

actionLibraryList.title: Child Pose
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Start in a kneeling position with the knees hip-width apart. Press the tops of the feet into the mat, sit the hips back toward the heels, and keep the pelvis stable.
2.Lengthen the spine, then hinge forward from the hips. Gently rest the forehead on the mat, extending the arms forward or placing them alongside the body to allow a gentle stretch through the lats and lower back. Keep the hips as close to the heels as possible and breathe evenly throughout the stretch.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770690951913.jpg","context":"1.Keep the shoulders relaxed and down.\n2.Maintain a neutral spine with a stable pelvis."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate: Breathe evenly in the stretch.
actionLibraryList.motionFeeling: Feel a stretch along the spine.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Avoid shrugging the shoulders.
2.Avoid arching the lower back.

actionLibraryList.title: Glutes Stretch
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Lightly engage the core, keep the pelvis neutral and stable, lower the shoulder blades, and relax the neck. Bring one leg forward, bending at the hip and knee, and extend the other leg back with the thigh on the mat. Keep the hips facing forward without tilting.
2.Inhale to lengthen the spine and level the pelvis. Exhale as you hinge forward from the hips, resting the forearms or forehead lightly on the mat. Maintain the back hip extended forward without collapsing the lower back, feeling a stretch through the hips and glutes. Breathe evenly while holding the stretch.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770691212351.jpg","context":"1.Keep the shoulders relaxed and down.\n2.Maintain a neutral spine and stable pelvis, avoiding any tilting."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate: Breathe evenly while in the stretch.
actionLibraryList.motionFeeling: Feel a stretch in the hips.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Keep the shoulders relaxed and down.
2.Maintain a neutral spine and avoid tilting the pelvis.

actionLibraryList.title: Chest Stretch
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Lightly engage the core, keep the pelvis neutral and stable, lengthen the spine, and let the shoulders relax down.
2.Inhale to prepare. With both arms straight, stack them in front of the body to one side, keeping the elbows extended and the shoulder blades stable. Exhale as the rib cage leads the upper body into an open rotation to the opposite side, reaching the top arm back behind the body. Lift and open the sternum to feel a gentle stretch across the front of the chest and shoulders. Breathe evenly.
3.Exhale with control to return to neutral and repeat on the other side.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770691265549.jpg","context":"1.Keep your shoulders relaxed and down.\n2.Keep the pelvis stable."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate: Breathe evenly.
actionLibraryList.motionFeeling: Feel a stretch across the front of the chest and shoulders.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Avoid shrugging the shoulders.
2.Keep the pelvis neutral and level.
